TH_ALICE-STRIKE.title: Strike
TH_ALICE-DEFEND.title: Defend
TH_ALICE-MANIPULATE.title: Manipulate
TH_ALICE-MANIPULATE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
All [gold]Dolls[/gold] prioritize attacking that enemy this turn.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_CREATE.title: Doll Creation
TH_ALICE-DOLL_CREATE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
{IfUpgraded:show:Choose one of three random [gold]Dolls[/gold] to create.| Randomly create a [gold]Doll[/gold].}
TH_ALICE-DOLL_MAKE.title: Doll Making
TH_ALICE-CREATE_SHANG_HAI.title: Shanghai Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_PENG_LAI.title: Hourai Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_LONDON.title: London Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_XI_ZANG.title: Tibetan Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_HINA.title: Hina Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_ORL.title: Orleans Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_FRANCE.title: France Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_CURSE.title: Cursed Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_BOMB.title: Oedo Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_NETHERLAND.title: Netherland Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_RUSSIA.title: Russia Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_GOLIATH.title: Goliath Doll
TH_ALICE-CREATE_ROUND_TABLE.title: Round Table Doll
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BACK.title: Doll Return
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BACK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BACK.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put on top of your draw pile.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PUT.title: Doll Placement
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PIKE.title: Doll Thousand Spears
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PIKE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} extra damage for each [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-LITTLE_LEGION.title: Battle Sign「Little Legion」
TH_ALICE-LITTLE_LEGION.description: All [gold]Dolls[/gold] and you gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the number of current [gold]Dolls[/gold].
TH_ALICE-SKILL_SHANG_HAI.title: Curse Sign「Shanghai Doll」
TH_ALICE-RETURN_INANIMATENESS.title: Magic Manipulation「Return to Inanimateness」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_WAR.title: Battle Manipulation「Doll War」
TH_ALICE-ARTFUL_SACRIFICE.title: Magic Sign「Artful Sacrifice」
TH_ALICE-ARTFUL_SACRIFICE.description: Select a [gold]Doll[/gold] to lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_ALICE-CURSE_PENG_LAI.title: Curse「Hourai Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SEEK.title: Scout Sign「Seeker Dolls」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SEEK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_ALICE-SAKUYA_DOLL.title: Illusion Sign「Killing Doll」
TH_ALICE-SAKUYA_DOLL.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Cards:diff()} times.
TH_ALICE-SUICIDE_SOLIDER.title: Infantry「Suicide Squad」
TH_ALICE-SUICIDE_SOLIDER.description: All [gold]Dolls[/gold] deal damage equal to their current HP {Cards:diff()} times to random enemies, then [gold]Recycle[/gold] those [gold]Dolls[/gold].
TH_ALICE-SUICIDE_PACT.title: Sacrifice「Suicide Pact」
TH_ALICE-SUICIDE_PACT.description:
[gold]Recycle[/gold] a [gold]Doll[/gold].
Increase the intent value of all current dolls by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_ALICE-CUTE_BIG_PIKE.title: Spear Sign「Cute Big Thousand Spears」
TH_ALICE-TRIP_WIRE.title: Focus「Trip Wire」
TH_ALICE-TRIP_WIRE.description: Enemy loses {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn. All [gold]Dolls[/gold] prioritize attacking that enemy this turn.
TH_ALICE-GOLIATH_DOLL.title: Experiment「Goliath Doll」
TH_ALICE-SEMI_AUTOMATION.title: Doll「Semi-Automaton」
TH_ALICE-SEMI_AUTOMATION.description: All [gold]Dolls[/gold] act one additional time at the start of the turn.
TH_ALICE-CURSE_HANG_PENG_LAI.title: Curse「Hanged Hourai Doll」
TH_ALICE-CURSE_HANG_PENG_LAI.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
If you have a [gold]Hourai Doll[/gold], [gold]Recycle[/gold] one and make all enemies lose HP equal to its current HP.
TH_ALICE-HINA_DOLL.title: Elegant Sign「Spring Kyoto Doll」
TH_ALICE-CURSE_SHANG_HAI.title: Curse「Magical Color Shanghai Doll」
TH_ALICE-CURSE_SHANG_HAI.description:
For each type of debuff on the enemy, create a [gold]Shanghai Doll[/gold].
All [gold]Shanghai Dolls[/gold] heal HP equal to the number of debuff stacks on the enemy.
TH_ALICE-FOLK_DANCE.title: Doll「Soulless Folk Dance」
TH_ALICE-LEMMING_PARADE.title: Doll「Lemming's Parade」
TH_ALICE-LEMMING_PARADE.description:
Randomly generate [gold]Dolls[/gold] until you have {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dolls[/gold].
If the number of [gold]Dolls[/gold] exceeds {Cards:diff()}, randomly [gold]Recycle[/gold] [gold]Dolls[/gold] down to {Cards:diff()}.
TH_ALICE-CROSS_SOLDIER.title: Sword Sign「Crossing Soldiers」
TH_ALICE-CROSS_SOLDIER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Create a [gold]Shanghai Doll[/gold] for each living enemy.
TH_ALICE-CIRCLE_DOLL.title: Cycle Sign「Reincarnated Tibetan Doll」
TH_ALICE-CIRCLE_DOLL.description:
Shuffle all cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Create a [gold]Tibetan Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PART.title: Doll Part
TH_ALICE-DOLLER.title: Dollmaker of Bucharest
TH_ALICE-DOLLER.description: At the start of your turn, create a random [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-GIRL_DOLL.title: Girl Bunraku
TH_ALICE-GIRL_DOLL.description: Whenever you [gold]Recycle a Doll[/gold], heal all [gold]Dolls[/gold] for {Power:diff()} HP.
TH_ALICE-RECYCLE.title: Material Recycle
TH_ALICE-RECYCLE.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Doll Parts[/gold].
TH_ALICE-WORKSHOP.title: Doll Workshop
TH_ALICE-WORKSHOP.description: Every time you play [gold]Doll Part[/gold] twice, randomly create a [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-FREE_USE_ALL.title: Homing Magic
TH_ALICE-FREE_USE_ALL.description: Your next Skill, Attack, and Power card cost 0 energy.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_JUDGMENT.title: Doll Judgment
TH_ALICE-DOLL_JUDGMENT.description:
Whenever a [gold]Doll[/gold] is attacked, you gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Whenever you create a [gold]Doll[/gold], you gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_REVENGE.title: Vengeful Doll
TH_ALICE-DOLL_REVENGE.description: Whenever a [gold]Doll[/gold] loses HP, all [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_ALICE-LOW_TEA.title: Afternoon Tea Time
TH_ALICE-LOW_TEA.description:
End your turn.
At the end of this combat, gain [gold]Witch's Tea[/gold] (Relic: Gain 1 extra energy at the start of your next combat turn).
TH_ALICE-DEVILRY_LIGHT_RAY.title: Devil Light「Cruel Light」
TH_ALICE-DEVILRY_LIGHT_RAY.description:
All enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
For each {IfUpgraded:show:stack|type} of debuff on an enemy, the HP loss is doubled.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_IN_SEA.title: Manipulation Sign「Doll in the Sea」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_IN_SEA.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} card(s) from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and put them into your [gold]Hand[/gold]; they cost 0 the first time played this turn.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_IN_SEA.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_CRUSADER.title: Doll Crusader
TH_ALICE-ARTFUL_CHANTER.title: Artful Chanter
TH_ALICE-ARTFUL_CHANTER.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Draw {Power:diff()} additional card(s) next turn.
TH_ALICE-BOMB_DOLL.title: Oedo Explosive Karakuri Doll
TH_ALICE-SEEK_WIRE.title: Guidance Wire
TH_ALICE-SEEK_WIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy once.
Trigger an additional time for each [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-RAINBOW_WIRE.title: Rainbow Wire
TH_ALICE-RAINBOW_WIRE.description: A random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] gains {Replay:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_ROUND_TABLE.title: Knight「Round Table Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_ROUND_TABLE.description:
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
Create a [gold]Round Table Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-LOSTWORD.title: 「Freak in the Grand Guignol」
TH_ALICE-LOSTWORD.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage {ExtraDamage:diff()} times randomly.
Deal additional damage once for each type of [gold]Doll[/gold].
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} extra damage for each [gold]Doll[/gold].{InCombat:
 (Hit {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)}
TH_ALICE-STRAW_DOLL_KAMIKAZA.title: Curse Sign「Straw Doll Kamikaze」
TH_ALICE-STRAW_DOLL_KAMIKAZA.description:
Randomly [gold]Recycle[/gold] a [gold]Doll[/gold], then apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
For the next {Power:diff()} turns, [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on all enemies are twice as effective.
TH_ALICE-ITERATION.title: Iteration
TH_ALICE-ITERATION.description:
Randomly [gold]Recycle[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} [gold]Doll(s)[/gold].
Randomly create the same number of [gold]Dolls[/gold].
TH_ALICE-COLLECTOR.title: Witch Collector
TH_ALICE-COLLECTOR.description:
Upon pickup, add a [gold]Collectomania[/gold] to your deck.
At the end of combat, gain an extra [gold]Relic[/gold].
TH_ALICE-COLLECTOMANIA.title: Collectomania
TH_ALICE-COLLECTOMANIA.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, you take damage equal to the difference between its stack and the number of relics you have; if negative, heal instead.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_RUSSIA.title: White Sign「Chalky Russia Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_RUSSIA.description:
Create a [gold]Russia Doll[/gold].
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_ENEMY.title: Doll Ambush
TH_ALICE-DOLL_ENEMY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [gold]Doll[/gold], all [gold]Dolls[/gold] act immediately once.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BOW.title: Doll Archer
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For each card you play this turn, all [gold]Dolls[/gold] deal {Power:diff()} damage to that enemy.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_NETHERLAND.title: Red Sign「Netherland Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_NETHERLAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Cards:diff()} times.
Create a [gold]Netherland Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_CREMATION.title: Doll Cremation
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BLOW_UP.title: Doll Blow Up
TH_ALICE-DOLL_BLOW_UP.description: Select a [gold]Doll[/gold], make it act immediately {Cards:diff()} times, then [gold]Recycle[/gold] it.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SP.title: Doll SP
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DEATH_WITCH.title: Death Witch
TH_ALICE-DEATH_WITCH.description:
Double the damage you deal.
If you did not play any Attack cards this turn, lose 6 HP at the end of your turn.
TH_ALICE-DREAM_VISIT.title: Dream Visit to Wonderland
TH_ALICE-ALICE_UNREAD.title: Alice in Wonderland
TH_ALICE-ALICE_UNREAD.description: [gold]Dolls[/gold] no longer absorb unblocked damage. Instead, at the end of your turn, you gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to their HP.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_AUTO.title: Doll Unmanipulated
TH_ALICE-DOLL_AUTO.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
For each card you play this turn, all your [gold]Dolls[/gold] act immediately once.
TH_ALICE-ALICE_KILLER.title: Thousand Killer Alice
TH_ALICE-ALICE_KILLER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and make them lose an equal amount of [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
TH_ALICE-GOOD_MAN_DIE.title: Honest Man's Death
TH_ALICE-GOOD_MAN_DIE.description:
Recycle 7 [gold]Dolls[/gold].
Resurrect all your dead allies.
TH_ALICE-FIGHT_FUTURE.title: Support the Future
TH_ALICE-FIGHT_FUTURE.description: All players gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra next turn.
TH_ALICE-DISCUSSION.title: Seminar
TH_ALICE-DISCUSSION.description:
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
All players draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_ALICE-BODY_BLUDGE.title: Body Bludgeon
TH_ALICE-BODY_BLUDGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]; you gain that much [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_ALICE-MANA_RUN_OUT.title: Mana Overdraft
TH_ALICE-MANA_RUN_OUT.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Energy gained each turn is reduced by 1.
TH_ALICE-MEGATRON.title: Alice Megatron
TH_ALICE-MEGATRON.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for this combat.
TH_ALICE-LAZY.title: Laziness
TH_ALICE-LAZY.description:
Apply 1 [gold]Slow[/gold] to {IfUpgraded:show:all enemies|all characters}.
End your turn.
TH_ALICE-SHANG_HAI_ATTACK.title: Shanghai Impact
TH_ALICE-SHANG_HAI_ATTACK.description: Create a [gold]Shanghai Doll[/gold]. Make all [gold]Shanghai Dolls[/gold] act immediately once.
TH_ALICE-ALICE_MAGATROID.title: Maga-Toroid
TH_ALICE-ALICE_MAGATROID.description: If the number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is greater than your current {Energy:energyIcons()}, gain the difference in {Energy:energyIcons()}; otherwise, draw the difference in cards.
TH_ALICE-MASTER.title: Booth Prototype Master
TH_ALICE-ALICE_SIGNAL.title: Alice Distress Signal
TH_ALICE-FLOWER.title: Dappled Marguerite
TH_ALICE-FLOWER.description: At the end of your turn, all [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain {Power:diff()} max HP.
TH_ALICE-FUTURE_DOLL.title: Doll「Future Bunraku」
TH_ALICE-FUTURE_DOLL.description: At the end of your turn, if you have any remaining {Energy:energyIcons()}, randomly create a [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-COLORFUL_DOLLER.title: Colorful Dollmaker
TH_ALICE-COLORFUL_DOLLER.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each [gold]Doll[/gold],
and draw 1 card for each type of [gold]Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-WITCH_FORM.title: Witch Form
TH_ALICE-WITCH_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] any number of Attack cards in your hand into [gold]God Gun[/gold], and any number of Skill cards into [gold]God Reuse[/gold].
TH_ALICE-GOD_GUN.title: God Gun
TH_ALICE-GOD_GUN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_ALICE-GOD_REUSE.title: God Reuse
TH_ALICE-GOD_REUSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold].
TH_ALICE-GOD_REUSE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to add [gold]Replay[/gold] to.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_LONDON.title: Dark Sign「Foggy London Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_LONDON.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Create a [gold]London Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_FRANCE.title: Pale Sign「Charitable France Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_FRANCE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
Create a [gold]France Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_ORL.title: Pale Sign「Charitable Orleans Doll」
TH_ALICE-WITCH_DINNER.title: Witch's Dinner
TH_ALICE-WITCH_DINNER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, heal HP equal to damage dealt.
On [gold]Kill[/gold], increase Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
TH_ALICE-CITY_WITCH.title: Urban Witch
TH_ALICE-CITY_WITCH.description:
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Frail[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_WAX.title: Cycle Sign「Disappointing Wax Doll」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_WAX.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Create a [gold]Random Wax Doll[/gold].
TH_ALICE-VIOLENT_INVULTUATION.title: Curse「Unholy Cursed Doll」
TH_ALICE-VIOLENT_INVULTUATION.descriptio: Remove all positive effects from an enemy(Except for those that may cause problems); create a [gold]Cursed Doll[/gold] for each effect removed.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_MEGA_CETI.title: Red Sign「Doll Mega Ceti」
TH_ALICE-DOLL_MEGA_CETI.description:
Select a [gold]Doll[/gold] to [gold]Recycle[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_DANCE.title: Doll Dance
TH_ALICE-DOLL_DANCE.description: Each time you play a card, a random [gold]Doll[/gold] acts once; if you have no [gold]Dolls[/gold], create a [gold]Doll[/gold] instead.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SQUARE.title: Doll Square
TH_ALICE-DOLL_SQUARE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have a [gold]Doll[/gold], gain it again.
TH_ALICE-MAKE_SEQUENCE.title: Creation Process
TH_ALICE-MORE_AND_MORE.title: More and More
TH_ALICE-MORE_AND_MORE.description:
For every {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dolls[/gold] you have, randomly create a [gold]Doll[/gold].
If you have no [gold]Dolls[/gold], create 2 [gold]Dolls[/gold] instead.
TH_ALICE-MAGIC_SHOT.title: Magic Missile
TH_ALICE-MAGIC_SHOT.description:
Deal 2~5 damage {Cards:diff()} times.
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_ALICE-MESSAGE_EXCHANGE.title: Academic Exchange
TH_ALICE-MESSAGE_EXCHANGE.description:
Choose 1 from 3 other character's {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold]} Skill cards and add it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Play it for free this turn.
TH_ALICE-ENGLAND_ROSE.title: England Rose
TH_ALICE-ENGLAND_ROSE.description:
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
[gold]Thorns[/gold] also make the enemy lose equal HP.
TH_ALICE-SHANG_HAI_ALICE_MUSIC.title: Shanghai Alice Fantasy Orchestra
TH_ALICE-SHANG_HAI_ALICE_MUSIC.descripti: All your cards cost 1 less energy for this combat and gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_ALICE-MUST_NOT.title: No Entry
TH_ALICE-MUST_NOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All enemies take double damage this turn.
TH_ALICE-BODY_REMAKE.title: Taboo「Human Body Refinement」
TH_ALICE-BODY_REMAKE.description:
[gold]Recycle[/gold] all your [gold]Dolls[/gold].
Increase your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()} for each [gold]Doll[/gold] recycled.
TH_ALICE-HOMER_EXPOSE.title: Homebody Exposure
TH_ALICE-DOLL_REPLACEMENT.title: Replacement Doll
TH_ALICE-DOLL_REPLACEMENT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each living [gold]Doll[/gold] reduces damage you take this turn by 10%.
TH_ALICE-YA_PENG_LAI.title: Elegant Sign「Quiet Hourai Doll」
TH_ALICE-YA_PENG_LAI.description:
Draw 1 card for each [gold]Hourai Doll[/gold] you have.
Create {Cards:diff()} [gold]Hourai Doll(s)[/gold].
TH_ALICE-EVENT.title: Old Card
